title: Rocket Lab USA (RKLB) Q1 2026 Earnings Report
text: Rocket Lab delivered record Q1 2026 results with revenue of $200.3 million, a 63.5% year-over-year increase that exceeded analyst estimates. The company achieved record GAAP and non-GAAP gross margins while expanding its backlog to $2.2 billion. The strong revenue growth was driven by robust demand across all business segments, including Electron launch services, HASTE hypersonic testing, and Space Systems satellite manufacturing. Q2 guidance of $225-240 million in revenue represents continued acceleration, positioning Rocket Lab for one of its strongest years yet. The company booked 31 new launch contracts during the quarter and secured a record-breaking deal with an undisclosed customer for five Neutron and three Electron launches.
